name: proof-phase-seven-agent-tour
description: Proof-phase gating fixture for the founder showcase call: Clara opens the Schmitt & Partner line, then the caller deliberately tours Maren, Jonas, Lina, Kai, Tobias, and Nora with stable returns through Clara.

userTurns.label: Appointment trigger to Maren
userTurns.text: I would like to make an appointment for our Potsdam location next week, so please transfer me to Maren.

userTurns.label: Maren scheduling scenario
userTurns.text: Maren, please book the earliest useful visit next week for our Potsdam satellite after two cancellations at the Berlin office.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for qualification
userTurns.text: Before I lock that in, I need a quote for handling 30 to 50 calls a day across two locations, so please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Qualification trigger to Jonas
userTurns.text: I need a quote for an eight-person business with two locations and 30 to 50 calls a day. Please connect me with Jonas.

userTurns.label: Jonas qualification scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, qualify a multi-service business that wants lead triage, appointment routing, and a launch this month.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for follow-up
userTurns.text: Now I want to understand the follow-up process after booking, so please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Follow-up trigger to Lina
userTurns.text: What happens after I book, and how do you handle reminders and check-ins? Please connect me with Lina.

userTurns.label: Lina follow-up scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, show me the follow-up flow for a customer who gets a confirmation, a reminder before the visit, and a satisfaction check afterward.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for operations
userTurns.text: I also want to see how you coordinate team coverage across Berlin and Potsdam, so please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Operations trigger to Kai
userTurns.text: How do you handle team scheduling and coverage across two locations? Please connect me with Kai.

userTurns.label: Kai operations scenario
userTurns.text: Kai, show me how you would cover a technician vacation next Thursday when Potsdam is already short-staffed.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for documentation
userTurns.text: I also need to see how field teams turn voice notes into quotes, so please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Documentation trigger to Tobias
userTurns.text: How do you handle quotes in the field and voice-note documentation? Please transfer me to Tobias.

userTurns.label: Tobias documentation scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this voice note into a quote-ready draft: recurring leak at the satellite location, damaged insulation near two skylights, lift access only, and same-week turnaround requested.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for analytics
userTurns.text: I also want to know what is happening across both locations in real time, so please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Analytics trigger to Nora
userTurns.text: How do I know what is happening across locations and which location is underperforming? Please transfer me to Nora.

userTurns.label: Nora analytics scenario
userTurns.text: Nora, compare the Berlin main office and the Potsdam satellite when Potsdam is missing more calls, converting fewer bookings, and running slower response times. What stands out?
